sections.description: Native SEO control layer for the RankRocket remediation pipeline. Manages title/meta, schema injection, image ALT text, llms.txt, XML sitemap, cache purge, and self-updates.
sections.changelog:
v2.6.0: Styled XML sitemaps via XSL stylesheet (browser-readable); per-type sub-sitemaps (posts, pages) replace the single combined sitemap; accurate UTC lastmod dates.
v2.5.0: WordPress admin panel + Edit Post/Page read-only meta box.
v2.4.1: Fix document title override timing bug.
v2.4.0: POST /migrate-legacy endpoint; PHPUnit/phpcs testing stack.
